_meta.source: World Bank/KNOMAD bilateral remittance matrix; OECD-DAC bilateral ODA (Table DAC2A); World Bank WDI trade-as-%-GDP (NE.TRD.GNFS.ZS)
_meta.license: WDI: CC-BY-4.0; KNOMAD: free for non-commercial use with attribution; OECD-DAC: OECD terms of use
_meta.note: trade arcs are self-referential (from==to): trade openness is a per-country attribute, not a bilateral flow. remittance/aid arcs are genuinely bilateral. remittances are model-based estimates (USD millions); aid is OECD-DAC ODA disbursements (USD millions).
